specific_mechanism: Honeybee swarms choose nest sites via decentralized quorum: scouts return with waggle dances proportional to site quality; quorum threshold (~15 bees committed) triggers swarm departure
llm_application: LLM agent swarm decision via quorum: each scout-agent returns a 'dance' = embedding direction proportional to candidate-action quality; quorum threshold triggers commitment without central coordination.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes apiology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
